zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert Denys於大約1360年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根時，他的父親William Dennis Esq.-11歲，母親Margaret Corbett-15歲。他於大約1379年與Margaret Corbet在英國格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他於1378年住在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾希斯頓。他於1406年被列為steward of lordship of newport。他去世於1422年3月24日在英國格盧斯特斯爾希斯頓享年63歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾希斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilbert Denys于大约1360年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根时，他的父亲William Dennis Esq.-11岁，母亲Margaret Corbett-15岁。他于大约1379年与Margaret Corbet在英国格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他于1378年住在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾希斯頓。他于1406年被列为steward of lordship of newport。他去世于1422年3月24日在英国格盧斯特斯爾希斯頓享年63岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾希斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Denys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Luc, Lucien.  Polish Casimir, Wiktor.
Flemish and French: from a variant of the personal name   Denis  .

Polish, Rusyn, and Ukrainian: from the personal name Denys, an equivalent of Dennis . In some cases this may also be an American shortened form of patronymics from the personal name Denys, such as Ukrainian Denysenko and Denysevych, Polish Denysiewicz.

variants.name: Denis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Jacques, Armand, Marcel, Andre, Pierre, Serge, Yvan, Alphonse, Edouard, Francois, Gaetane.  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Jorge, Roberto, Angel, Francisco, Joaquin, Juan, Manuel, Miguel, Ramon, Rolando.

French, Walloon, Breton, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, Dutch, English, and Portuguese; Spanish and Galician (Denís): from the personal name Denis, Spanish and Galician Denís, from Latin Dionysius ‘(follower) of Dionysos’ (see Dennis ). Compare Dennee .
Ukrainian and Rusyn: variant transliteration of   Denys  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert Denys was born about 1360, in Glamorgan, Wales, his father, William Dennis Esq., was -11 and his mother, Margaret Corbett, was -15. He married Margaret Corbet about 1379, in Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He lived in Siston, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom in 1378. In 1406, at the age of 47, his occupation is listed as steward of lordship of newport. He died on 24 March 1422, in Siston, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 63, and was buried in Siston, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert Denys est né environ 1360, à Glamorgan, Galles, son père, William Dennis Esq., avait -11 ans et sa mère, Margaret Corbett, avait -15 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Corbet environ 1379, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il a vécu à Siston, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1378. En 1406, à l’âge de 47 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est steward of lordship of newport. Il est décédé le 24 mars 1422, à Siston, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Siston, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilbert Denys um 1360 in Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Dennis Esq. -11 und seine Mutter Margaret Corbett -15. Er hat um 1379 in Gloucestershire, England Margaret Corbet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. 1378 hat er in Siston, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom gelebt. 1406, als er 47 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als steward of lordship of newport aufgeführt. Er starb am 24. März 1422 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Siston, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Siston, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert Denys è nato il circa 1360 nel Glamorgan, Galles, il suo padre, William Dennis Esq., aveva -11 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Corbett, aveva -15 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Corbet circa 1379, nel Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Vissuto a Siston, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1378. ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert Denysが約1360年にウェールズグラモーガンで生まれた時，父William Dennis Esq.は-11歳，母Margaret Corbettは-15歳であった。約1379年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでMargaret Corbetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1378年にはイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアシストンに住んでいた。1406年，47歳の時，職業はsteward of lordship of newportと記録されている。彼は1422年3月24日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアシストンで63歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアシストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert Denys(이)가 대략 1360년 웨일스 글램르건에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Dennis Esq.(은)는 -11세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Corbett(은)는 -15세였다. 그는 대략 1379년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 Margaret Corbet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1378년도에 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 시스턴에서 살았다. 1406년, 47세의 나이로 그의 직업은 steward of lordship of newport이었다. 그는 1422년 3월 24일 영국 그루스스터실르 시스턴에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 시스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert Denys nasceu aproximadamente 1360, em Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, William Dennis Esq., tinha -11 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Corbett, tinha -15 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Corbet aproximadamente 1379, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele viveu em Siston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1378. Em 1406, com 47 anos, sua profissão aparece como steward of lordship of newport. Ele faleceu em 24 de março de 1422, em Siston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Siston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert Denys родился около 1360 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, его отцу по имени William Dennis Esq. было -11 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Corbett, -15. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Corbet около 1379 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он жил в местности систон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в 1378 году. В 1406 году, в возрасте 47 лет,  он работал по профессии steward of lordship of newport. Он умер 24 марта 1422 г. в местности систон, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности систон, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gilbert Denys nació aproximadamente 1360, en Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, William Dennis Esq., tenía -11 años y su mamá, Margaret Corbett, tenía -15 años. Se casó con Margaret Corbet aproximadamente 1379, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Vivió en Siston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1378. En 1406, a la edad de 47 años, su ocupación registrada era steward of lordship of newport. Murió el 24 de marzo de 1422, en Siston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Siston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
